title: RELEASE_PROCESS.md: cleanup Cirrus references
body: And preferably replace them in accordance with our GHA-based CI.

comments.body:
Hi! I’d like to work on this issue.

From what I have seen so far, the old Cirrus references in `RELEASE_PROCESS.md` can likely be replaced with the current GitHub Actions workflows, especially the main CI workflow and `Release Pipeline Validation`.

I will also check the current `podman-machine-os` release flow before changing that part, just to avoid removing anything that is still relevant
